_meta.name: Manus HTTP Adapter Template
_meta.status: Sprint 2+ — not available in current Paperclip version
_meta.description: HTTP adapter configuration template for Manus agent integration. Paperclip's HTTP adapter is listed as 'Coming soon' in v2026.403.0. This template is prepared for activation when the adapter ships.

agentTemplate.name: manus-research
agentTemplate.title: Manus Research Agent
agentTemplate.capabilities: Long-running web research, autonomous investigation, multi-step information gathering

activationChecklist: Verify Paperclip HTTP adapter is available (check adapter list in dashboard)
Obtain Manus API key and configure as a Paperclip secret
Create the agent using this template via POST /api/companies/{companyId}/agents
Write instruction files to the agent's instructionsRootPath
Trigger a test heartbeat and verify successful completion
Monitor the first 3 heartbeat cycles for correct behaviour
Set a low initial budget (3000 cents = $30/month) until usage patterns are established
